title: Better Attack Indicator
description: An attack indicator which shows exactly when you can power attack/crit
body:
Description

Better Attack Indicator is a resource pack þat makes þe attack indicator useful in PvP-encounters.

Instructions

  • When þe sword notch appears, it means you can power attack/crit wiþ a sword
  • When pixels start appearing to þe right of þe sword notch, it means you can power attack/crit wiþ an axe (or any oþer slower weapons)
  • See images for visual instructions

Concerns can be directed towards proddy_ on Discord
